_comment: Source registry. Adding a live source = implement its adapter + add a block here. active=false means disabled or planned; verify adapter availability before enabling. 'gets' documents which signals a source provides.

places_direct.note: Fallback: only runs if Apify (primary) returns nothing — out of credits / error / empty.

apify_maps.note: Places/Maps at scale + Google reviews. Wave 1.

opencorporates.note: Optional legacy enricher. Disabled: do not treat OpenCorporates as a core dependency.

website_scrape.note: Self-hosted (C2 node), no key. Always on.

newfilings_nj.note: Implemented as inactive NJ business-download license roster seed adapter. Dry-run uses deterministic fixture; live mode requires official roster_path from https://newjersey.mylicense.com/Verification_Bulk/Search.aspx?facility=Y. Seed rows need resolver promotion before C2.

dealership_directory.note: Source-first dealership seeds from OEM locators, dealer group pages, marketplace listings, dealer platform footprints, license rosters, and associations. Inactive until a resolver writes seed/research lanes before C2.

restaurant_directory.note: Source-first restaurant seeds from Places-style exports, OpenTable/Resy, Toast/ChowNow/Slice/delivery profiles, associations, tourism pages, chambers, and local lists. Inactive until a resolver writes seed/research lanes before C2.

pharmacy_directory.note: Source-first pharmacy seeds from state pharmacy boards, license rosters, NCPA, Good Neighbor, Health Mart, CPESN, associations, and local directories. Inactive until a resolver writes seed/research lanes before C2.

social_intent.note: Research-only public social/web intent lane. Writes shared_context.research_signals through workspace/pipeline/social_intent.py; never promotes leads, queues outreach, sends, approves, or mutates CRM.
